$comment: C11/C23 6.4.3 (FF1/FF2) surrogate-half witness: U"\uD800" names a UTF-16 surrogate half - not a Unicode scalar value - so the compile FAILS LOUD with the dedicated H_InvalidUniversalCharacterName (unsuppressable), never a silent CESU-8 / wrong unit. Red-on-disable: drop the FF1 surrogate reject in decodeEscapedBytes and this compiles. The load-bearing pin is the CODE + a rejected compile at the literal position.
